/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/miniDB.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniDB.dir/src/serializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniDB.dir/src/statement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniDB.dir/src/pager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniDB.dir/src/table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniDB.dir/src/schema.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniDB.dir/src/database.cpp.o -o miniDB
